---
title: "Appendix: Declaration of AI Use"
author: "Urvi Joshi"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
---

## Declaration of AI Use

In completing this assignment, I used Claude (Anthropic) as a generative AI tool in the following ways:

**Debugging and error fixing:** I used Claude to help identify and fix errors encountered during the assignment, such as issues with file paths and CSV naming.

**Understanding R code:** I used Claude to help me understand what certain functions and terms do in R, such as `is.na()`, `filter()`, `select()`, and ggplot2 options.

**Writing assistance:** I used Claude to help improve the writing in certain sections of the report, such as the introduction and dataset introduction.

All final decisions about the content and structure of the report were my own.

## Screenshots

![Screenshot 1](screenshots/screenshot1.png)

![Screenshot 2](screenshots/screenshot2.png)

![Screenshot 3](screenshots/screenshot3.png)

![Screenshot 4](screenshots/screenshot4.png)
